newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The ERP-rollout securities-fraud investigation (Feb 24 disclosure, ~$30M lost sales, >$20M remediation, ~23% drop) remains an open overhang. The autonomous-robotics products (X16 SWEEP, X2 ROVR SCRUB) and $250M-robotics-by-2028 goal were all announced pre-cutoff. June 15 dividend was routine.

sources.label: TNC ERP probe / robot scrubber (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: Nothing genuinely new since June 9. The autonomous-cleaning-to-facility-robotics pathway is intact (ROVR portfolio, $250M robotics-by-2028 goal) but the open ERP securities-fraud probe is a lingering management-credibility overhang; small negative drift, no rank change on this strict screen.
verdicts.bull: Expanding ROVR autonomous-scrubber portfolio and $250M robotics target give a credible path from cleaning to facility robotics.
verdicts.neutral: Robotics is still a small slice; ERP disruption and the legal probe cap re-rating until resolved.
verdicts.bear: Securities-fraud investigation over ERP failure raises management-credibility and litigation risk; AI/robotics link is thin.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Open ERP securities-fraud probe / management credibility
